topics: Identify different logic ICs, their specifications, and pin configurations
Implementation of basic and universal gates and realization of basic gates using universal gates; realization of SOP and POS expressions using logic gates
Design of 4:1 Multiplexer and 1:4 Demultiplexer circuits using basic gates and study of mux/De-mux ICs
Realization of Multiplexers and De-multiplexers using gates and study their ICs
Analysis of the characteristics of TTL gate
Realization of Encoder and Decoder circuits using gates
Implementation of SR, T, and Master Slave JK flip flops using basic gates
Realization of Ring counter and Johnson Counter using flip flops
Design and implementation of 2-bit comparators and code converters using logic gates
Design of asynchronous counters: up and down asynchronous counter, up/down asynchronous counter using mode control
Design of synchronous counters: up and down synchronous counter, up/down synchronous counter using mode control, mod-N synchronous counter
Design of shift registers (any two): SISO, SIPO, PISO, PIPO shift registers; Serial/Parallel Shift register using mode control
Familiarization with Verilog HDL coding; modelling and simulation of basic gates, simple Boolean functions (any two), and combinational circuits (any two) using Verilog (gate level)
